zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal於1412年出生在英國英格蘭肯特澤亞爾時，他的父親John Theobald II33歲，母親Isabella Barci29歲。他於大約1443年與Christine Kroesmer在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1444年在英國英格蘭享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可素費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal于1412年出生在英国英格兰肯特澤亞爾时，他的父亲John Theobald II33岁，母亲Isabella Barci29岁。他于大约1443年与Christine Kroesmer在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1444年在英国英格兰享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可素費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and English: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements theud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The English surname represents a learned form, re-created from French Théobald. The usual medieval forms of the name in English and German were Tebald and Tibalt (Old French Teobaud, Tibaut). Compare Dewald and Diebold .

variants.name: Dewald
meanings: German: from the personal name Diebold, from Middle High German Dietbold, from Old High German diot ‘people, nation’ + bald ‘brave, strong’. As an American surname this is also an altered form of the cognate Theobald . Compare Davolt , Dawalt , Daywalt , Devault 3, and Dewalt 1.

History: One of the first Dewalds in North America was Johannes Michael Dewald from Medard, a village in the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived at Philadelphia, PA, in 1738 on the ship Glasgow. He married Maria Barbara Schmidt and settled in Berks County, PA. His father's surname was Theobald. Michael's descendants also bear some other altered forms of the surname, including Dewalt, Dawalt, and Davolt. — One of the earliest immigrants who bore the original German surname Dewald was Henry alias He(i)nrich Dewald from the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived in PA in 1766. His descendants mainly bear altered forms of the surname, especially Devault .

variants.name: Tidball
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): variant of   Theobald  .

variants.name: Tebbs
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of Tebb, which is usually from a pet form of the Middle English male personal name Tebbold (see Theobald ).

variants.name: Tipple
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the medieval personal name Tebald, Tibalt (see Theobald ).
German: nickname for a simple person, from Low German tippel ‘point, corner’ (a reference to the pointed shape of a fool's cap).
German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name, a pet form of   Dietrich  .

variants.name: Tibbs
meanings: English: variant of Tibb, from the Middle English personal name Tibbe, which was used in the 13th century as both male (from Tibald, see Theobald ) and female name (a shortened form of Tibot, a pet form of Isabel, see Tebbutt ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal was born in 1412, in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Theobald II, was 33 and his mother, Isabella Barci, was 29. He married Christine Kroesmer about 1443, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1444, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in Suffield, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal est né en 1412, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Theobald II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabella Barci, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Christine Kroesmer environ 1443, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1444, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Suffield, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal 1412 in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Theobald II 33 und seine Mutter Isabella Barci 29. Er hat um 1443 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Christine Kroesmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1444 im Alter von 32 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Suffield, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal è nato il nel 1412 nel Seal, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Theobald II, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Barci, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Christine Kroesmer circa 1443, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1444, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffield, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Sealが1412年にイギリスイギリスケントセアルで生まれた時，父John Theobald IIは33歳，母Isabella Barciは29歳であった。約1443年にイギリスイギリスケントでChristine Kroesmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1444年にイギリスイギリスで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Theobald II(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Barci(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Christine Kroesmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1444년 영국 잉글랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 수필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal nasceu em 1412, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Theobald II, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Barci, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Christine Kroesmer aproximadamente 1443, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1444, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffield, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal родился в 1412 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Theobald II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Barci, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Christine Kroesmer около 1443 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1444 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности суффиелд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal nació en 1412, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Theobald II, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabella Barci, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Christine Kroesmer aproximadamente 1443, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1444, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Suffield, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
